channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Notion isn't just a note-taking app –here are 5 ways I'm using it to run my life in 2026
item.description: Notion has become an all-in-one app like no other – here’s why it’s worth a look in 2026, plus my favorite new tools.
item.dc:creator: Lloyd Coombes, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch NHL Winter Classic 2026: live stream New York Rangers vs Florida Panthers, TV channels, preview
item.description: Here's how to watch Rangers vs Panthers live streams online in the 2026 NHL Winter Classic, as the traditional New Year's game heads to Florida for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Sam Altman wants to pay some lucky person $555,000 a year to look after OpenAI's AI - but obviously, all is not quite as it seems
item.description: OpenAI is hiring a new head to look after model abuse and safety for $555k plus equity, but it'll be high-stress.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Experts warn AI advances could lead to 200,000 banking jobs being cut this year
item.description: European banking workers could be at risk of redundancy due to AI after years of job cuts from store closures.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Las mejores entrevistas a líderes de TI en CIO ESPAÑA en 2025
item.description: Sonia Segade, directora de Transformación Digital y Tecnología de Renfe La apuesta por la inteligencia artificial, la hiperautomatización, el análisis de datos, la ciberseguridad y la convergencia entre las tecnologías de información y de operación son algunas de las palancas de futuro de Renfe, seg
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: USPTO proposes dramatic restrictions on patent challenges through inter partes review
item.description: Both the patent owner and the company facing patent assertion must understand these changes and adjust their litigation strategies accordingly. The post USPTO proposes dramatic restrictions on patent challenges through inter partes review first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: China requires chipmakers to use at least 50% domestic equipment
item.description: According to Reuters, China is now requiring its chipmakers to use at least 50% domestically made equipment when expanding their production capacity. The rule is not publicly documented, but chipmakers must show that at least half of their equipment is Chinese to get government approval.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Never lose your car with Maps parking tools
item.description: Learn how to set up Google Maps and Apple Maps on your phone to automatically remember where you parked. Step-by-step instructions for enabling location services and parking detection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Wispr CEO: What a post-keyboard office might look like
item.description: Voice-to-text tools have been around for decades, yet there’s little sign that office workers are relying any less on their keyboards.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: On a remote Alaskan glacier, a 73-year mission of recovery and respect
item.description: "The glacier is changing rapidly. We don't know how much time we have leftso we've really focused on expediting the recovery efforts," Carlos Colon said. The post On a remote Alaskan glacier, a 73-year mission of recovery and respect first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service
item.description: "It's so important not to get caught up and react to the moment, but to be reflective, smart and strategic, and to respond in the moment," Kshemendra Paul said. The post From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: The top Google Pixel tips of 2025
item.description: More and more, there are Android tips — and then there are Pixel tips. Owning a Google Pixel phone has become a ticket of sorts to a uniquely top-tier type of Android experience.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta buys high-profile AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta is now buying the hyped AI startup Manus for about $2 billion, TechCrunch reported. Founded in Singapore by former Chinese entrepreneurs, Manus gained widespread attention after a viral demo video showing an AI agent that could handle everything from job interviews to stock analysis.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Humanoid robots are having a moment, but still face an uphill battle
item.description: Robots have long been seen as a bad bet for Silicon Valley investors — too complicated, capital-intensive, and “boring, honestly,” says venture capitalist Modar Alaoui.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company
